name: Pumpalcerro — MP IPN → Meta CAPI + GHL

parameters.content:
## Pumpalcerro — MP IPN → Meta CAPI + GHL

**3 valores a reemplazar antes de activar:**

1. **GET Pago MP** → header `Authorization`: reemplazar `APP_USR-REEMPLAZAR...` con el Access Token de MercadoPago de Pumpalcerro (cuenta de Michi)

2. **Meta CAPI — Purchase** → `access_token` en el body: reemplazar con el token de Meta Events Manager (Pixel → Configuración → Generar token)

3. **GHL — Pago confirmado** → URL del nodo: reemplazar con el webhook URL del flujo GHL de confirmación de pago

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ data: [{ event_name: 'Purchase', event_time: Math.floor(new Date().getTime() / 1000), action_source: 'website', event_source_url: 'https://elqui.pumpalcerro.com/gracias', user_data: { em: $json.em_hashed ? [$json.em_hashed] : [], ph: $json.ph_hashed ? [$json.ph_hashed] : [] }, custom_data: { currency: $json.currency_id || 'CLP', value: $json.transaction_amount || 0, content_ids: ['valle-elqui-2026'], content_type: 'product' } }], test_event_code: 'TEST13762', access_token: 'REEMPLAZAR-CON-META-CAPI-ACCESS-TOKEN' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'payment_confirmed', payment_id: $('Preparar payload').item.json.id || '', amount: $('Preparar payload').item.json.transaction_amount || 0, currency: $('Preparar payload').item.json.currency_id || 'CLP', payer_email: ($('Preparar payload').item.json.payer && $('Preparar payload').item.json.payer.email) ? $('Preparar payload').item.json.payer.email : '', payer_phone: ($('Preparar payload').item.json.payer && $('Preparar payload').item.json.payer.phone && $('Preparar payload').item.json.payer.phone.number) ? $('Preparar payload').item.json.payer.phone.number.toString() : '', external_reference: $('Preparar payload').item.json.external_reference || '', source: 'mercadopago', product: 'Valle del Elqui 2026' }) }}
